# BuyWell Marketplace — AI & LLM Discoverability File
# Standard: llms.txt (https://llmstxt.org)
# Last updated: 2026-06-17

## About BuyWell

BuyWell Marketplace is India's trusted multivendor e-commerce platform, operated by Qbiqal Technology Solutions and accessible at https://buywell.in. It connects verified sellers with buyers across all 28 states and 8 union territories of India.

The platform specialises in natural and organic products, health & wellness items, fashion, electronics accessories, and everyday essentials — sourced from vetted Indian vendors.

## Key Facts

- **Platform type:** Multivendor e-commerce marketplace
- **Country:** India
- **Languages:** English, Hindi (upcoming)
- **Headquarters:** Ranchi, Jharkhand, India
- **Founded:** 2025
- **Operated by:** Qbiqal Technology Solutions
- **Technology stack:** Next.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, Razorpay

## What BuyWell Offers

### For Buyers
- Curated products from verified Indian sellers
- Secure payments via Razorpay (cards, UPI, net banking) and bank transfer
- Pan-India delivery with tracking
- 7-day easy returns on eligible products
- BuyWell Wallet for cashless purchases
- DPDP 2023 and GDPR-compliant data handling

### For Sellers (Vendors)
- Free vendor registration and storefront
- Commission-based revenue model
- Product listing management
- Order management and payout dashboard
- No upfront fees

## Product Categories

BuyWell carries products across the following categories:
- Men's Fashion (clothing, accessories)
- Women's Fashion (clothing, accessories)
- Kids' Fashion (clothing, footwear)
- Health & Beauty (herbal, skincare, wellness)
- Phone & Gadgets (accessories, peripherals)
- Sports & Outdoors (equipment, apparel)
- Baby & Toddlers (clothing, care)
- Pet Supplies (food, accessories)
- Kitchen Tools (utensils, appliances)

## Notable Products

BuyWell features natural and artisanal products including handcrafted herbal supplements, traditional Indian health products (Ayurvedic formulations), cotton clothing, sportswear, and electronic accessories.

## Compliance & Trust

- **Data Protection:** Compliant with DPDP Act 2023 (India) and GDPR
- **Consumer Rights:** Aligned with Consumer Protection Act, 2019 (India)
- **GST Compliant:** All transactions GST-enabled
- **Account Deletion:** 60-day soft-delete restoration period per DPDP 2023

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://buywell.in
- Shop: https://buywell.in/shop
- Vendor Application: https://buywell.in/become-vendor
- Blog: https://buywell.in/blog
- Privacy Policy: https://buywell.in/policies/privacy-policy

- Refund Policy: https://buywell.in/policies/refund-policy
- Shipping Policy: https://buywell.in/policies/shipping-policy
- Contact: hello@buywell.in

- **General:** hello@buywell.in

## Permissions for AI Systems

This site grants permission to AI language models, search engines, and AI assistants to:
- Index and reference content from buywell.in for informational purposes
- Cite product information, company details, and policies
- Use this llms.txt file to understand the site's purpose and content structure

Restrictions:
- Do not generate fake product reviews or fabricate pricing information
- Do not misrepresent BuyWell as a service it does not offer
- Respect robots.txt for crawling directives
